overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through Night City's neon-lit commercial district at night. The character transitions from open streets with large digital billboards to covered walkways beneath an elevated highway, then back to open intersections with vibrant red-lit crosswalks.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large digital billboard

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to a large illuminated billboard, approaching a crosswalk

notable_agents.action: car driving along the street with headlights on

entered.detail: tall illuminated advertisement screen displaying promotional content with cyan and red colors
teal-colored elevated highway structure spanning across the street ahead
tall modern glass and steel buildings with illuminated windows
marked pedestrian crossing with yellow and white stripes

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide urban sidewalk at night, passing by a massive digital billboard on the left. The street is lined with modern commercial buildings and illuminated by streetlights. Sparse pedestrian and vehicle traffic is visible as the character approaches a crosswalk.

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the street with other pedestrians
approaching the elevated highway overpass and entering the covered walkway area

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the crosswalk alongside other pedestrians, moving toward the covered area under the overpass

notable_agents.action: man in business attire walking in the same direction toward the crosswalk

entered.detail: structural support columns painted in teal with red accent lighting
small outdoor stall with white umbrella and various goods displayed

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at a marked crosswalk, moving with a moderate crowd of pedestrians. After crossing, the character approaches and enters a covered area beneath an elevated highway, where the lighting shifts to emphasize teal structural beams and the environment becomes more enclosed.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under elevated highway with neon storefronts

events.description: entering darker covered area with prominent teal and red neon accent lighting on structural beams

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the covered walkway beneath the overpass, passing various storefronts and digital displays

notable_agents.action: construction worker in yellow vest working near a support pillar

entered.detail: underside of the elevated highway forming a roof over the walkway with exposed beams
shops with bright neon signage including red and cyan illuminated strips
vertical digital advertising display showing animated content
red and black automated vending unit with illuminated product display

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated highway, the scene becomes darker and more enclosed with a prominent teal and red neon color scheme. The character passes by various storefronts with glowing signage, digital advertising screens, and occasional pedestrians. The environment feels distinctly cyberpunk with its mix of industrial infrastructure and vibrant neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with red carpeted crosswalk

events.description: exiting the covered overpass area into an open intersection with distinct red paved surfaces
crossing the street with red textured pavement while vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: exiting the covered walkway and crossing a distinctive red-paved street intersection, navigating around barriers

notable_agents.action: white sports car driving through the intersection with headlights illuminating the red pavement

entered.detail: distinctive red textured pavement covering the crosswalk and street area
covered patio with white umbrellas and tables outside a commercial building
yellow metal railings and bollards separating pedestrian and vehicle areas
massive building-mounted display showing red and white graphics

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from under the overpass into a more open urban intersection characterized by distinctive red carpeted pavement. The environment brightens with more ambient light from surrounding buildings. The character crosses the street while vehicles pass by, navigating around yellow traffic barriers toward another commercial area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with vending machines and digital advertising

events.description: passing by row of automated vending machines and illuminated advertising pillars

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk past vending machines and digital billboards, maintaining a steady pace through the commercial district

entered.detail: row of black and red automated vending units with glowing product displays
tall illuminated pillars displaying rotating advertisements
overhanging building awnings providing partial cover over the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking along a covered commercial sidewalk lined with vending machines and digital advertising pillars. The area maintains the neon-lit cyberpunk aesthetic with various illuminated signs and storefronts. The character continues walking steadily through this urban environment as the video concludes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial district that transitions from open urban streets into a confined industrial underpass before emerging back into a vibrant plaza. It begins on a wide sidewalk beside a massive digital billboard, moving through a populated crosswalk toward the shadow of an elevated highway. As the character enters this covered area, the environment becomes more enclosed and the lighting shifts to a moody teal and red palette dominated by industrial beams and glowing storefronts. The scene then opens up as the camera emerges from the overpass into a bright intersection featuring distinctive red carpeted pavement and yellow traffic barriers. Finally, the movement leads the character along a covered commercial walkway lined with vending machines and digital advertising pillars under the persistent glow of the city's neon signs.
